svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="夜间全量测试+自动修复" id="nightly"> <mxGraphModel dx="-594" dy="-224" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1140" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TRIGGER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="定时触发 (默认每天 00:00, 可 --time)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="380" x="380" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Phase 0 · 预检
平台检测 + Node 初始化 + 获取运行锁
save_state: 记录每仓库当前分支" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="380" x="380" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Phase 1 · 工作区准备
未提交改动 → auto-commit (wip: nightly checkpoint)
每仓库 checkout dev → pull origin/dev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="380" x="380" y="152" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P2_GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="Phase 2 · 全量测试 (8 步, fail-fast)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1060" x="40" y="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="①③ 后端单测 + 前端单测
(并行)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="60" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="② 后端集成测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="260" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="④ 运营后台单测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="420" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⑤ 启动后端 :8080" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="580" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⑥ 运营 E2E" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="120" x="740" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⑦ 前端 H5 E2E" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="120" x="880" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⑧ 小程序编译验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry width="200" x="880" y="326" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DECISION" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="测试结果?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="510" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PASS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="全过 → 飞书 [PASS]
直接进 Phase 4 恢复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="200" x="820" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P3_GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#dc2626;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="Phase 3 · 失败处理 (仅代码失败触发)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="1060" x="40" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ENV_FAIL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="环境失败
(后端启不来/DB 不可达)
→ 飞书告警, 跳过修复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="60" y="476" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AGENT_FIX" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="3a · Agent 分析日志
切 fix 分支 → 改代码 → push
(不提 MR, 交给脚本验证)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="300" y="476" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REVERIFY" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="3b · 脚本切 fix 分支
重跑【完整 8 步测试】防回归" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="560" y="476" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REVERIFY_DEC" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="回归通过?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="120" x="820" y="476" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MR_OK" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="3c · 创建 MR 到 dev
(不合并) → 飞书「已修复+MR」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MR_FAIL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="删 fix 分支
→ 飞书「修复未通过验证, 需人工」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="280" x="340" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NO_ROOT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Agent 无法定根因
→ 输出分析, 不强改, 飞书通知" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="640" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Phase 4 · 恢复 (always, 含 trap 兜底)
restore_state: 切回每仓库原始分支 (含 fix 分支清理)
stop_backend · 释放锁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="380" x="380" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DONE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="完成 · 开发者工作区无损还原" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="380" x="380" y="752" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_T_P0" edge="1" parent="1" source="TRIGGER" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_P0_P1" edge="1" parent="1" source="P0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_P1_P2" edge="1" parent="1" source="P1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P2_GRP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_P2_DEC" edge="1" parent="1" source="P2_GRP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="DECISION"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_DEC_PASS" edge="1" parent="1" source="DECISION" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#16a34a;" target="PASS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_DEC_P3" edge="1" parent="1" source="DECISION" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;" target="P3_GRP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_FIX_REVER" edge="1" parent="1" source="AGENT_FIX" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="REVERIFY"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_REVER_DEC" edge="1" parent="1" source="REVERIFY" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="REVERIFY_DEC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_DEC_MROK" edge="1" parent="1" source="REVERIFY_DEC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#16a34a;" target="MR_OK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_DEC_MRFAIL" edge="1" parent="1" source="REVERIFY_DEC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;" target="MR_FAIL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_PASS_P4" edge="1" parent="1" source="PASS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="P4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_P3_P4" edge="1" parent="1" source="P3_GRP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="P4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_P4_DONE" edge="1" parent="1" source="P4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="DONE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

→ 输出分析, 不强改, 飞书通知

div.div:
Phase 4 · 恢复 (always, 含 trap 兜底)
restore_state: 切回每仓库原始分支 (含 fix 分支清理)
stop_backend · 释放锁
